violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed wearing jewelry on arms and/or hands during food preparation. Recommend employees remove rings and watches during food preparation.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Damaged hood filters. Missing ribs.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Wire rack shelving in walk in cooler rusting.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Area around fryers has an accumulation of grease and needs cleaning. Wire rack shelving in walk in cooler has an accumulation of debris and need cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store food related items away from refuse cans in customer self service cabinets. Store food service gloves away from fryer cleaning equipment. Store bowls off floor near BOH slicer.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
